scripts.firebase:use-account: firebase login:list 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q 'aimeric.rouyer.pro@gmail.com' || firebase login:use aimeric.rouyer.pro@gmail.com
scripts.firebase:whoami:
echo '
=== Firebase deploy target check ===' && echo '
>> Logged-in accounts (active one is marked):' && firebase login:list && echo '
>> Project this folder will deploy to (from .firebaserc):' && firebase use && echo '
--- Ctrl+C now if anything above is wrong ---
'
scripts.predeploy: npm run firebase:use-account && npm run firebase:whoami
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting --account aimeric.rouyer.pro@gmail.com -P default
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && firebase hosting:channel:deploy preview --account aimeric.rouyer.pro@gmail.com -P default
